title: Bacterial genomes used for in-silico PCR of vvhA in V vulnificus
author: Peasari, JohnReddy
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Excel csv file contains the accession numbers for the 12, 410 bacterial species analyzed by in-silico PCR of the vvhA gene in Vibrio vulnificus. Primers were designed by Vinoshna Sama with the assistance of JohnReddy Peasari.
steps_raw: Excel csv file contains the accession numbers for the 12, 410 bacterial species analyzed by in-silico PCR of the vvhA gene in Vibrio vulnificus. Primers were designed by Vinoshna Sama with the assistance of JohnReddy Peasari.
